description: A legal order, decree, or official ledger establishing or tracking monthly child support financial obligations.

first_name.instruction: First name of the person receiving child support.

recipient_state.instruction: State of the recipient. Two-letter code.

payer_name.instruction: Full name of the person paying child support. May be labeled as Payor, Obligor, or Defendant.

case_number.instruction: The court case number or state registry identification number associated with the child support file.

order_date.instruction: Date the court order was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.

payment_amount.instruction: Ordered payment amount per period. Presented as lump sum.

payment_frequency.instruction: How often payments are due, such as Monthly, Semi-Monthly, or Weekly.

payment_type.instruction: Type of support: Child Support, Alimony, or both.

effective_start_date.instruction: Date the support obligation begins. YYYY-MM-DD format.

effective_end_date.instruction: Date payments are ordered to end, if specified. YYYY-MM-DD format.

child_name.instruction: Name of the child for whom support is ordered. If multiple children, include each child's name.
